title: Projede Dr. Öğr. Üyesi Arif Selçuk Öğrenci Araştırmacı olarak projede yer almaktadır. Aslı’yı tebrik eder, araştırmalarında başarılar dileriz.

MyKHAS

Türkçe

As part of KHAS Get Together! event, our MIS department students met with our department alumni.

In the event where a pleasant atmosphere was created, our graduates shared their experiences about career planning and the diversity of the MIS department’s working areas with our students.

P5070678 Scaled

In the event where our department academicians, students and graduates came together, students had the opportunity to chat with academicians and graduates and reached insights that will benefit their future plans. At the same time, our academicians and graduates had a pleasant time by having the opportunity to meet.
